caption: The video features a man speaking at an event called "theCUBE LIVE at BigDataSV 2015," held at the Fairmont Hotel in San Jose, CA. He is wearing a blue shirt with the "INFOOBJECTS" logo and has a microphone attached to his ear, indicating he is likely giving a presentation or participating in an interview. The background prominently displays the logos for "theCUBE" and "SiliconANGLE," suggesting a tech-focused conference. The man appears engaged and is possibly discussing topics related to big data or technology, as indicated by the setting and context of the event. The table in front of him holds some materials, which might be part of his presentation or notes.
